description_long: This is a robust wooden barrel with a dark, weathered finish, reinforced by four thick black metal hoops encircling its body. The barrel features a striking black dragon motif painted on its side, giving it an ornamental and possibly thematic appearance. The top of the barrel is flat and also displays a subtle geometric marking, suggesting it may be used for decorative or thematic storage. A small round wooden bung is visible on one side, indicating a traditional method for accessing the barrel's contents. The wood grain is visible throughout, and the metal bands have a slightly matte, hammered texture. The overall construction suggests durability and a design suited for both practical storage and visual impact in an urban or themed environment.
description: A dark wooden barrel reinforced with black metal hoops and decorated with a black dragon motif, featuring a flat top and a side bung.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dragon motif and the full round shape of the barrel with all metal hoops visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the dragon's body and the continuous metal bands, with the wood grain clearly visible.
description_view_2: Angled view showing the dragon's head and part of the side, with the top geometric marking partially visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the wooden bung and the continuation of the dragon motif, with all metal hoops and the flat top in view.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: black dragon motif, geometric marking on top
